title: Vein Miner Revived
description: A simple and lightweight smart veinmining algorithm which can be tuned with an easy to understand configuration menu. Should be compatible with external mods that add ores and such.
body:
A Minecraft Forge mod made to give ease to mining clumps of ores, logs and more! All with the power of crouching!

## Open the config
with **>>Right Shift<<**

##
A simple and lightweight smart veinmining algorithm which can be tuned with an easy to understand configuration menu. Should be compatible with external mods that add ores and such.
